sentence_reviews.text: Regular spatial arrays encode pixels, voxels, fields, maps, and video frames.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML book1 long TOC: common image datasets and neural networks for images, convolution/pooling/image classification/segmentation (lines 15-17 and 433-456); AIMA contents.html: computer vision and convolutional networks with tensor operations in CNNs (lines 49-53 and 561-575).
sentence_reviews.notes: The sources support images, pixels implicitly through vision/image networks, CNNs, and spatial vision tasks. Voxels, fields, maps, and video frames are not directly supported in the inspected passages.

sentence_reviews.text: The role of Images, video & spatial grids is to connect Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Signal processing & harmonic analysis to downstream capabilities including Multimodal, simulated & streaming data, Self-supervised learning, Masked prediction objectives.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML book1 long TOC: image datasets, neural networks for images, convolutional layers, self-supervised learning, and unsupervised pretraining (lines 15-17, 433-462, and 585-587); AIMA contents.html: tensor operations in CNNs and masked language models in NLP pretraining (lines 561-575 and 655-659).
sentence_reviews.notes: Images, tensors, CNNs, and self-supervised learning are supported. Video/spatial grids, harmonic analysis, multimodal/simulated/streaming data, and masked prediction objectives for images are only partially supported.

sentence_reviews.text: substrate for Multimodal, simulated & streaming data
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML book1 long TOC: common image datasets, common text datasets, and data preprocessing (lines 15-20).
sentence_reviews.notes: Image/text data support multimodal data only indirectly, and simulated/streaming data are not established by the inspected evidence.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML book1 long TOC: self-supervised learning and unsupervised pretraining sections (lines 9-13 and 582-587), plus neural networks for images (lines 433-462).
sentence_reviews.notes: The source supports self-supervised learning and image modeling, but not the exact substrate wording.

sentence_reviews.evidence_location: AIMA contents.html: NLP pretraining and transfer learning, including masked language models (lines 655-659), and CNN tensor/image material (lines 561-575).
sentence_reviews.notes: Masked language models are directly named, but the inspected evidence does not support spatial-grid masked prediction objectives specifically.

sentence_reviews.text: Encoding choices can discard information, amplify bias, or make important invariances difficult to learn. Its direct dependencies include Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors, Signal processing & harmonic analysis.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML book1 long TOC: image preprocessing/data, convolution/pooling/image priors/features, and linear algebra (lines 15-20, 433-462, and 206-259); AIMA contents.html: tensor operations in CNNs and fairness/bias (lines 561-575 and 745-749).
sentence_reviews.notes: The evidence supports tensor/CNN representations and bias as a broader AI concern. The discard-information, invariance, and harmonic-analysis claims are not directly supported.

sentence_reviews.text: Images, video & spatial grids consumes, emits, or organizes information using Scalars, vectors, matrices & tensors.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML book1 long TOC: image neural networks and linear algebra/matrix data material (lines 433-462 and 206-259); AIMA contents.html: tensor operations in CNNs (lines 561-575).
sentence_reviews.notes: The image/CNN tensor relation is directly supported, but the video and spatial-grid generalization is synthesized.

sentence_reviews.text: Images, video & spatial grids rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Signal processing & harmonic analysis.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML book1 long TOC: convolutional layers, pooling layers, and image priors/features in neural networks for images (lines 433-462).
sentence_reviews.notes: Convolution/pooling support signal-processing-adjacent operations, but harmonic analysis is not directly supported by the inspected source.

sentence_reviews.text: Images, video & spatial grids rests on the formal or computational capabilities supplied by Geometry, topology & symmetry.
sentence_reviews.evidence_location: PML book1 long TOC: image segmentation, pose estimation, manifolds, and manifold learning (lines 451-456 and 628-638); AIMA contents.html: computer vision and robotics applications (lines 49-53 and 616-619).
sentence_reviews.notes: Geometry is relevant to vision/spatial tasks, but topology and symmetry are not directly established in the inspected passages.

edge_reviews.notes: CNN tensor operations and image networks support the represents_with/core edge.
The source supports convolutional image processing, but not the broader harmonic-analysis foundation. Core strength is plausible but not directly evidenced.
Geometry is relevant to image/spatial tasks; topology and symmetry are less directly supported. Common strength is defensible.
